paragraphs_signedOut: You’ll be asked to scan your face or fingerprint, or enter your device passcode, PIN or pattern.
paragraphs_signedIn: A passkey lets you sign in faster, without needing your GOV.UK One Login password.
For example, using your face, fingerprint or device passcode.
This will be the same way you unlock your phone, computer or tablet.
create.insetText_signedIn: You should not set up a passkey on a device that you share with other people.
create.detailsTitle_signedOut: Where will my passkey be saved?
create.detailsTitle_signedIn: Where will my passkey be saved?
detailsParagraphs_signedOut: Your passkey will be saved privately to your device or cloud account  - such as your password manager.
Your biometric data won’t be shared with GOV.UK One Login or any services that you access with it.
detailsParagraphs_signedIn: Your passkey will be saved privately to your device or cloud account  - such as your password manager.
Your biometric data won’t be shared with GOV.UK One Login or any services that you access with it.
